title: Door for One
storyPurpose: Battle ends; Nira stops Vex from harming Spark; hunters retreat; sanctuary doors open for Spark.

panels.description: Nira Quill blocks Vex's finishing strike toward Spark with her own rod.

bubbles.speaker: Nira Quill
bubbles.text: Alive capture — not a corpse for the ledger.

panels.description: Hunters retreat into trees; devices sparking dead.

bubbles.text: The Meridian withdraws — not defeated forever.

panels.description: At road's end: Shellward Sanctum doors of living stone and nested-arc metal open as Spark approaches alone; Mira's party waits at threshold respectfully.

bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
bubbles.text: It opens for you. We'll wait our turn.

dialogue.speaker: Nira Quill
dialogue.text: Alive capture — not a corpse for the ledger.

dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
dialogue.text: It opens for you. We'll wait our turn.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 23/25 — Door for One. Story purpose: Battle ends; Nira stops Vex from harming Spark; hunters retreat; sanctuary doors open for Spark. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p23a): Nira Quill blocks Vex's finishing strike toward Spark with her own rod. Panel 2 (p23b): Hunters retreat into trees; devices sparking dead. Panel 3 (p23c): At road's end: Shellward Sanctum doors of living stone and nested-arc metal open as Spark approaches alone; Mira's party waits at threshold respectfully. Characters: mira-eggwarden. Creatures: . Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: pre-dawn. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"hunters":{"status":"retreated","nira":"defected-soft"},"sanctuaryProgress":"doors-open-for-Spark","mossprig":{"injuries":["binding burn across shoulder"],"status":"stable"}} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
artAlt: Door for One — Spark's Journey page 23
transcript: SPEECH (Nira Quill): Alive capture — not a corpse for the ledger.
SPEECH (Vex Halden): You'll answer for this.
NARRATION: The Meridian withdraws — not defeated forever.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): It opens for you. We'll wait our turn.
